titleStmt.title: SII 26.663: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 663. (A.R. No. 621 of 1909.) TIRUCHCHIRAI, KUMBAKONAM TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Tribhº Vikramachōḷadēva: Year 5, Mithuna (Āṉi) ba. 13, Thursday, Rōhiṇī = 1122 A.D., June 4. The week-day was Sunday.

summary.p: This inscription is damaged in some places.

It records the sale of land by the assembly of Śrīrājasundarich-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a Brahmadēyam in Śēṟṟūr-kūṟṟam in Kulōttuṅgaśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu to a certain Kōḷari Ulaguyyavandāṉ alias Vāṇādi[rāyaṉ] of Uṇḍāḻañjēri who in his turn gave the same, after it was named after him as Ulaguyyavandaviḷāgam, to the shrine of the goddess Āḷuḍaiyāḷ of the bedroom of the temple of the god Tiruchchenneṟiyuḍaiya-mahādēvar of the place. The cultivable land and kitchen-garden land were taken by some local persons by paying kuḍivilai. It is stated at the end that the assembly received 117 kāśu in respect of this land from the temple and it was made tax-free.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tiripuvanaccakravattikaḷ śrīvikkiramacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 5 Āvatu mitunanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu tra
yodaciyum viyāḻakkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Urocaṉināḷ kulottuṅkacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu ceṟṟūr kūṟṟat
tu brahmateyam śrīrājasuntariccaturvvetimaṅkalattup paṭṭapperumakkaḷuḷḷiṭṭa mahāsabhaiyom
Ivūr ṉūṟṟuvaṉampalatte ceytu kūṭṭaṅkuṟaivaṟak kūṭiyiruntu Iyāṇṭu nammuroṭṭi
pokam potāmaiyil yāṇṭu mo ta vellāmiṟuttum Eṅkaḷāṟ teṭalāvaṉavu
yiṟuttum Eṅkaḷil nāṅkaḷ kuṭivilai koḷvārilāmaiyālum ciṟitu
tākiluṅkuṭut kaṭamai Iṟuppomenṟu Ippaṭṭapperumakkaḷuḷḷiṭṭa mahāsabhaiyom ca
mmatittu Iṟaiyiḻittuk kuṭutta paricāvatu Ivvūr tiruccenneṟiyuṭaiya mahādevar tiruppaḷḷiyaṟaiyāḷuṭai
yāḷukkut tiruccennaṭaippuṟamākavum tirunantavāṉaṅkaḷākavum Uṇṭāḻañceri Uṭaiyār koḷari Ulakuyya
vantāṉāṉa vāṇāti mikaḷ pakkal kā Ulakuyyavantaviḷāka mennumpiyarāl nāṅkaḷiṟaiyi
liceytu kuṭutta tiripuvaṉamātevivatikkuk kiḻakku rājentra- coḻavāykkālukkut teṟkumunṟā
ṅkaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇṭāñ catirattu nāṅkaḷ Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭukkiṟa viḷainilattukkum puncey nilattu
nirnilainilattukkum kiḻpāṟkellai Innāyaṉār nāṟpatteṇṇāyiravan maṭappuṟa Iṟaiyili viḷaini
ceynilattukkum meṟkum tenpāṟkellai kaṇṇāṟṟukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai catirattukku
teṟkum vaṭapāṟkellai kaṇṇāṟṟukku teṟkum Āka Ivvicaitta perunāṉ kellaiyuḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa Ivvūri
yan tirucceṟainārāyaṇan cirāmapaṭṭaṉum namana tirucceṟai nārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉum kavuṇiyan śrī
vāsuteva māṭilan tirucceṟai nārāyaṇan ciriḷaṅkovum ṉum kavuṇiyanampicco
māciyaeñāna paṭṭaṉum Ivvaṉaivarum kuṭivilaiyākak koṇṭa viḷainilam �panta yum kollai nilam
vatu nilam 4 � ṉum nirnilai nilam �pa vum Ākanilam 1�¬ vukkum kuṭivilaiyāka koyilil śrī
māheśvarakkaṇkāṇipiḷḷaiyaṭiyārum tevakaṉmikaḷum kaivaḻikoṇṭa 2 10000 2 1000 3 10m sabhaiyār pakkal vilaiko
ṇṭaviḷainilam � nilam (1/2) � yum punceynilam 2mā m ¿ nilam pa ndha ¿ mukkāl nilam pa dvam nirnilanilam mayum Āka nilam 2 10 4(1/4) nilam 1kāṇi ku vilai
kkoṇṭa kācu 1(1/4) 1araikkāl ṉum Ākakkollaiyuṭpaṭanilam 1� nilam (1/2)�-1kāṇi Innilam Onṟeyonpatumā muntirikaik kiḻaraiye mākāṇiyum
Innāyanār tirunāmattile vilaikoṇṭu kuṭivilaiyiṭṭa kācu 2 10 4�4 Ikkācu Irupattu nāleyaṟu māvaraiyum kāṭṭeṟṟik kaiccelavaṟa
koṇṭu Innāyanār tiruppaḷḷiyaṟaiyāḷuṭaiyāḷukku somamāyirunta nilam 1(1/4)�nilam �-1kāṇi yum Iṟaiyilicey
tu Ippiḷḷaiyaṭiyārum tevakanmikaḷuṅ kaivaḻikkoṇṭa kācu 100 10 7 Ikkācu nūṟṟorupatteḻuṅkoṇṭu Innilamiṟaiyili cey
tu kuṭuttom Ippaṭṭap perumakkaḷuḷḷiṭṭa sabhaiyom—
Digital edition of SII 26.663 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
